context_for_next_testing_agent: P3-B SO Type Routing fully verified. All 38 tests pass. Key features: _resolve_so_type normalizes dropship variants (drop_ship, drop-ship, Dropship) to 'dropship', warehouse variants (wh, Warehouse) to 'warehouse', missing/empty to 'unknown'. _resolve_so_routing_fields returns ship_to_code/ship_to_name/ship_to_address for dropship (no location_code), location_code for warehouse (default MAIN from BC_DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE_CODE env var). Preflight endpoint returns so_type in document_summary and mapped_values.so_routing. from-document endpoint returns 503 in preview (BC not available) but would include so_type, so_routing, ds_auto_approved in response. Dropship auto-approve uses WorkflowEngine to advance from extracted→ready_for_approval→approved.

verified: Dropship: returns ship_to_code, ship_to_name, ship_to_address from doc
Warehouse: uses explicit location_code if present
Dropship: so_routing has ship_to_code, ship_to_name, ship_to_address
Function signature includes ship_to_code, ship_to_name, location_code parameters
SALES_INVOICE workflow allows ON_APPROVED from 'extracted' state
SALES_INVOICE workflow allows ON_APPROVED from 'ready_for_approval' state
SALES_INVOICE workflow allows ON_MARK_READY_FOR_APPROVAL from 'extracted' state
Warehouse SOs do NOT trigger auto-approve (guard check)
Returns 503 when BC credentials not configured (expected in preview)
